payload.body: Done. Enabled span-locations feature on proc-macro2 in rustricted-lower's Cargo.toml; span_to_range in pipe.rs uses real byte_range; rewrite_call_args in named_args.rs gets the call site span (from the paren Group) plumbed in and uses it for R0042+R3001. R4001 already had real spans. End-to-end verified: rustricted check examples/01-lints/positional-fail.rs now points at line 11:17 (the actual call site) instead of 1:1.
